arms_mandatory_baselines: the five P1 §6 routes, first-match-from-top, with route 5 as the explicit else branch

dependent_vars.definition: member verdict objects (registry/verdicts/<id>.json) + family-h0 Holm decisions
dependent_vars.name: member_verdict

n_planned.replication_buys: at most 1 per experiment/gap, at most 2 programme-wide; NARROW-AND-CONTINUE never invocable twice for the same named gap

endpoints.test: P1 §1 decisive-YES pattern: >=1 of {HC1,HC2,HE1..HE6} PASS under its own kill criterion incl. beating its kernel-as-text arm (and for HC1/HE1/HE2 the gloss-text self-verify+retry arm) at >=2 rungs, surviving role-separated re-derivation

extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: P1 §4b row H0 (verbatim): Measured range: 135M–1.7B (+3B repl.). Envelope: Verdict valid 135M–7B-class only; nothing at frontier without Tier 5. Anchor: No published scaling law covers kernel-type interventions; disjunction inherits the tightest surviving member's envelope.
kill_criterion_verbatim: P1 §1 H0-NO pattern (verbatim): 'ALL of the following, each as a TOST-bounded null or explicit kill: (a) F2 kills HE1 and HE2 at both (R1,R2) and (R2,R3) pairs; (b) E9-full kills HC1 AND the constraint arm HC2; (c) F4 kills HE4 (in-context text matches the adapter path); (d) F6 toy rung kills HE6 (or the text-scaffold arm matches it), OR F6 is INSTRUMENT-INVALID after its pre-registered instrument repair, in which case HE6 is scored undetermined-not-supporting ... If any of (a)–(c) — or (d) absent its carve-out — is instead INCONCLUSIVE or INSTRUMENT-INVALID after its single replication buy (§6 cap), H0-NO is NOT established and the tree routes to STOP-AND-PUBLISH-UNDECIDED (§6 route 5).' The five §6 routes partition the outcome space; route 5 is the explicit else branch — the tree can never evaluate to nothing (RT-1). INCONCLUSIVE here = route 5.

corpus_hashes._recipe: sha256 over the sorted concatenation of '<relpath>:<file-sha256>\n' lines for every file under data/<corpus>/

title: a-h0 — the H0 disjunction gate: P1 §1 YES/NO patterns + the STOP-AND-PUBLISH-UNDECIDED route (RT-1) as expressions over member verdict objects; replication-buy cap 1/experiment + 2 programme-wide; F6 instrument carve-out (RT-19) scored undetermined-not-supporting; linted against family-h0 at freeze
